stories.title: Rodgers says he'll retire after season: 'This is i...
stories.summary: Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers said Wednesday that the 2026 season will be the last of his Hall of Fame-worthy career.

stories.title: Flagg, Knueppel lead way on All-Rookie 1st team
stories.summary: The NBA unveiled its All-Rookie selections Wednesday night, with the Mavs' Cooper Flagg, the Hornets' Kon Knueppel and the Sixers' VJ Edgecombe being unanimous picks for first-team honors.

stories.title: Browns HC praises Sanders: 'Come a long way'
stories.summary: Browns coach Todd Monken praised quarterback Shedeur Sanders' development Wednesday, saying the second-year player has "come a long way."

stories.title: Blazers lay off many business-side employees
stories.summary: The Portland Trail Blazers have laid off a significant number of business-side employees as part of a reorganization under new owner Tom Dundon.

stories.title: Raiders' Kubiak: Mendoza has been 'as advertised'
stories.summary: QB Fernando Mendoza has made a strong impression in his first month with the Raiders, with coach Klint Kubiak saying the No. 1 pick has been "as advertised."
